home.title: Glatko — Montenegro's Premier Service Platform
home.description: Trusted professionals for villa cleaning, boat maintenance, and more in Montenegro. Get a free quote.

aboutContent.intro: Glatko is Montenegro's premium service marketplace, connecting homeowners, property managers, and boat owners with verified local professionals.
aboutContent.mission: Our mission is to make finding reliable service providers in Montenegro effortless, transparent, and secure.
aboutContent.location: Based in Budva, we are active across Budva, Kotor, and Tivat — with plans to expand throughout Montenegro.
aboutContent.services: From villa cleaning and renovation to boat maintenance and captain hire, Glatko covers a wide range of professional services.
aboutContent.howItWorks: Our platform uses a transparent bidding system: you describe what you need, verified professionals submit quotes, and you choose the best fit.
aboutContent.languages: Glatko is available in 9 languages: Turkish, English, Russian, German, Italian, Ukrainian, Serbian, Montenegrin, and Arabic.

termsContent.intro: These Terms of Service govern your use of the Glatko platform operated by Glatko DOO, a company registered in Montenegro.
termsContent.s1: Glatko operates an online marketplace connecting service requesters ("Customers") with service providers ("Professionals"). Glatko is not a service provider and does not perform any of the services listed on the platform.
termsContent.s2: You must provide accurate, complete information when creating an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials and for all activities under your account.
termsContent.s3: Customers must provide accurate descriptions of their service needs, treat professionals with respect, and make payments directly to professionals as agreed upon.
termsContent.s4: Professionals must hold valid licenses and permits where required, carry appropriate insurance, deliver services as described, and comply with all applicable laws of Montenegro.
termsContent.s5: All payments are made directly between Customers and Professionals. Glatko does not process payments or collect commissions at this time. Payment terms are agreed between parties.
termsContent.s6: The Glatko name, logo, and platform design are the property of Glatko DOO. Content uploaded by users remains their property, but users grant Glatko a non-exclusive license to display it on the platform.
termsContent.s7: Glatko acts solely as an intermediary. We do not guarantee the quality, safety, or legality of services provided by Professionals. Glatko's liability is limited to the maximum extent permitted by Montenegrin law.
termsContent.s8: These terms are governed by the laws of Montenegro. Any disputes shall be resolved by the competent courts in Budva, Montenegro.
termsContent.s9: Glatko reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms, engage in fraudulent activity, or harm the platform community.
termsContent.s10: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

privacyContent.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how Glatko DOO collects, uses, and protects your personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
privacyContent.s1: We collect the following personal data: full name, email address, phone number, location (city), profile photos, portfolio images, service request details and photos, and communication data between users.
privacyContent.s2: Your data is used to provide and improve our services, facilitate communication between customers and professionals, verify professional accounts, send service-related notifications, and ensure platform security.
privacyContent.s3: We retain your personal data for as long as your account is active. After account deletion, data is retained for up to 30 days for backup purposes, then permanently deleted.
privacyContent.s4: We share data with the following service providers: Supabase (database hosting), Vercel (website hosting and analytics), and Google (authentication). We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
privacyContent.s5: Under GDPR, you have the right to access, correct, delete, restrict processing, and port your data. You may also object to data processing. See our GDPR page for details.
privacyContent.s6: We use cookies for essential functionality and analytics. See our Cookie Policy for more information.
privacyContent.s7: We implement industry-standard security measures including encrypted data transmission (TLS), secure authentication, and regular security reviews.
privacyContent.s8: For privacy-related inquiries or to exercise your data rights, contact our Data Protection Officer at contact@glatko.app. We aim to respond within 30 days.

cookiesContent.intro: This Cookie Policy explains how Glatko uses cookies and similar technologies when you visit our platform.
cookiesContent.s1: These cookies are necessary for the platform to function. They include session management, authentication tokens, and locale preferences. They cannot be disabled.
cookiesContent.s2: We use Vercel Analytics to understand how visitors interact with our platform. These cookies collect anonymous usage data to help us improve the service.
cookiesContent.s3: These cookies remember your choices such as theme preference (light/dark mode) and cookie consent status.
cookiesContent.s4: You can manage or delete cookies through your browser settings. Note that disabling essential cookies may affect platform functionality.

gdprContent.intro: As a user of Glatko, you have the following rights under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR):
gdprContent.r1: You have the right to request a copy of all personal data we hold about you.
gdprContent.r2: You have the right to request correction of any inaccurate personal data.
gdprContent.r3: You have the right to request deletion of your personal data, subject to legal obligations.
gdprContent.r4: You have the right to request that we limit how we use your data in certain circumstances.
gdprContent.r5: You have the right to receive your data in a structured, commonly used format and transfer it to another service.
gdprContent.r6: You have the right to object to the processing of your personal data for specific purposes.
gdprContent.howToExerciseDesc: Send your request to contact@glatko.app with the subject line "GDPR Request". We will verify your identity and respond within 30 days.

contactContent.intro: We'd love to hear from you. Whether you have a question, feedback, or need support — reach out to us.
contactContent.whatsappDesc: Chat with us on WhatsApp for quick support
contactContent.viberDesc: Chat with us on Viber for quick support

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes! Requesting a service is completely free. You only pay for the quote you accept.
faq.a2: Every professional is verified with ID, references and proof of past work.
faq.a3: Currently active in Budva, Kotor and Tivat. Expanding across Montenegro soon.
faq.a4: Payment is directly between you and the professional. Glatko charges no commission.
faq.a5: Our two-way review system holds professionals accountable. Contact support if you have issues.

hero.title: Be one of Glatko's first 50 trusted professionals in Boka Bay
hero.subtitle: Lifetime Founding badge, 3 free months of featured placement in Year 2, and the chance to shape the platform.

badge.title: Lifetime Founding badge
badge.desc: A gold badge displayed on your profile, search results, and inside customer chats — forever.

featured.title: 3 months free featured placement (Year 2)
featured.desc: When paid featured slots launch in May 2027, you get the first 3 months free — top of relevant search results.

firstClient.title: First-mover advantage
firstClient.desc: Reach Boka Bay customers before competitors arrive. Build your review history early.

eligibility.title: Who can apply
eligibility.subtitle: Soft launch is Boka Bay-focused — we want quality over quantity in Year 1.
eligibility.boka: Operating in Budva, Kotor, or Tivat
eligibility.verified: Willing to complete identity + business verification
eligibility.portfolio: At least 3 portfolio examples and one company document
eligibility.experience: 2+ years of professional experience in your category

t1.title: Public soft launch
t1.desc: Glatko opens for Boka Bay. First 50 approved pros become Founding Providers.

t2.title: First 100 customers
t2.desc: Founding Customer program closes. Marketing scales to neighbouring cities.

t3.title: Year 2 launch
t3.desc: Featured placement & paid tiers go live. Founding Providers get 3 months free.

t4.title: Featured perk ends
t4.desc: Founding badge stays forever. Featured slots become standard pricing.

q1.question: Does the Founding badge expire?
q1.answer: No. The badge stays on your profile permanently as long as your account is in good standing.

q2.question: What does the 3 months featured placement mean?
q2.answer: When we launch paid featured listings in May 2027, your profile appears at the top of relevant searches for 3 months at no charge.

q3.question: Is there a fee to join?
q3.answer: No. Glatko is free for both customers and pros during the soft-launch phase.

q4.question: What if I'm not in Boka Bay?
q4.answer: We'll expand to other Montenegrin cities throughout 2026. You can still register and we'll let you know when your area opens.

q5.question: How long does verification take?
q5.answer: Most applications are reviewed within 1-2 business days after submission.

q6.question: Can I lose Founding status?
q6.answer: Only if your account is suspended for serious policy violations. Normal performance variance does not affect Founding status.

cta.title: Ready to join?
cta.subtitle: Submit your application — our team reviews in 1-2 business days.

hero.title: Be one of Glatko's first 100 customers and get 5 free credits
hero.subtitle: Founding Customer badge, 5 free request credits, and priority support — for being part of the first wave.

b1.title: Founding Customer badge
b1.desc: A purple badge on your reviews and chat handle — pros take you seriously from day one.

b2.title: 5 free request credits
b2.desc: Use them whenever you need a service across all categories — no expiry, no strings.

b3.title: Priority support + referrals
b3.desc: Direct line to our team for any issue, plus extra credits when you refer friends.

howToBecome.title: How to become a Founding Customer
howToBecome.step1: Create a free account on Glatko (takes ~30 seconds).
howToBecome.step2: Submit your first service request — any category, any city in Boka Bay.
howToBecome.step3: If you're among the first 100 to do so, your badge and 5 credits land automatically.

cta.title: Submit your first request
cta.subtitle: Free, no card required. Pros bid on your job — you pick the best fit.
